posts.hook: Your eyes blink 60% LESS when you're on your phone.
posts.caption:
Your eyes blink 60% LESS when you're on your phone. That's why they feel dry and tired by 5pm.

The fix takes 5 minutes.

#Axeo #EyeHealth #ScreenTime #HealthTok #DigitalEyeStrain
posts.visual_notes: Close-up of eyes staring at phone, slow-mo blink. Text overlay with stat. Cut to Axeo exercise demo.

posts.caption:
3 exercises ophthalmologists actually do themselves:

1. Focus Shift (60s) — near-far alternation
2. Palming (60s) — warm hands over closed eyes
3. 20-20-20 Rule (20s) — look 20ft away every 20 min

All 3 are free at axeo.vision

#EyeExercises #EyeTraining #Axeo #WellnessTok

posts.hook: Your eye muscles are the most active muscles in your body.
posts.caption:
Your eye muscles are the most active muscles in your body — 100,000+ movements per day.

But unlike your legs, you never stretch them.

Here's why eye training matters (thread):

1/ Your 6 extraocular muscles control every eye movement. After 7+ hours of screen focus, they're fatigued.

2/ The ciliary muscle controls your lens shape. Constant near-focus (phones, laptops) locks it in one position. This is why distance vision deteriorates.

3/ Clinical studies from the AAO show that structured eye exercises can improve convergence, reduce strain symptoms, and even improve near-focus.

4/ We built Axeo to make this easy. 17 exercises, 5 minutes/day, based on AAO & COVD guidelines.

Try free: axeo.vision
